result.question: what is ml
plan: Search the web for relevant information on 'ml'
Read the text of the Grammarly blog post on 'what is machine learning'
result.short_answer: Machine learning (ML) is a subset of artificial intelligence (AI) that uses data and statistics to create intelligent systems that can learn and improve their performance without being explicitly programmed.
key_findings: ML is a method to achieve AI
ML focuses on using data and statistics to create intelligent systems
ML systems require a dataset, an ML model, and a training algorithm to work
limitations: The search results provided some irrelevant information
The Grammarly blog post may not cover all aspects of ML
next_steps: Explore other types of ML, such as supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Investigate the applications and advantages of ML in various industries
